features.name: local memref alloc in non-top-level func
features.description: Code should include a memref.alloc operation inside a non-top-level func.func that is called from the entry point

features.name: non-top-level calyx component with external seq_mem
features.description: Code should include a calyx.component that is not the top-level entrypoint and contains a calyx.seq_mem marked with the external attribute

features.name: scf for loop with memref store to local alloc
features.description: Code should include an scf.for loop that performs a memref.store into a locally allocated memref

features.name: func call passing memref to callee
features.description: Code should include a func.call operation from the main entry function that passes a memref argument to a callee function

features.name: local calyx seq_mem without external or ref attribute
features.description: Code should include a calyx.seq_mem that represents purely local component memory and lacks both the external and ref attributes
features.snippet: %mem_0.addr0, ..., %mem_0.done = calyx.seq_mem @mem_0 <[3] x 32> [2] : i2, i1, i1, i1, i1, i32, i32, i1
